use_cases: Displaying status indicators like active, pending, or completed states on dashboard items
Showing count badges for notifications or unread items
Labeling content with categorical tags or feature indicators
Marking items with availability status such as premium, beta, or new
Indicating validation states with destructive or outline variants
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with four visual variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built on Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Features accessibility support with aria-invalid states, focus-visible ring styling, and composition via asChild prop. The badge uses rounded pill styling with configurable color schemes and supports hover states for nested anchor elements.
